lines.text: Do you Fisalias even honor contracts?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: And you are…?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Ah, so you're… Please accept my apologies! It's a relief to see you unscathed. We're as puzzled as you are about the Echo's behavior.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Miss Carlotta asked me to hold nothing back, so ask away.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Well, before I do, a little context first.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: In Ragunna, the Order controls all Terminals for Echo use. They store Echoes in their Data Bank and only grant access after thorough screening.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Only a select few Resonators are permitted to carry a Reserved Terminal.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: You see, most Ragunnesi rely on the Genesis Nexus and Common Echoes, with little need for the special access types.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: However, things have changed with Ragunna opening up to the greater Solaris. People want to travel, making Reserved Terminals essential for safety outside the Order's reach.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: You see why demand is up. The Montellis saw an opportunity and started to develop them. After all, necessity is the mother of invention, hm?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: It should be celebrated, but some think we disrespect the Order's authority or even the Sentinel by doing this. The path forward has been... resistant.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Heh, if you ask me, I suspect the Fisalia family has been spreading slanders about us.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: We back the Carnevale to showcase our Reserved Terminals to the people. It's our chance to prove their worth and attract investors.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Sigh… The Fisalias have coerced our miners to break their contracts, seizing our largest vein and cutting off our Terminal supply.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: They say the Fisalias have been seen frequenting the Cathedral of Mercury. They must be in league with the Order. How else would they dare to seize our mine so boldly?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: And it gets worse. With the Carnevale nearing and our Echoes malfunctioning, the family's Executor might have to step in.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: The Carnevale is at risk. While we hope it brings fortune, the festival itself is what truly matters to us, just like the rest of Ragunna.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: We must uncover why the Echo lost control. We cannot let the Fisalias use this to tarnish our reputation any further!
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: That would be good for us, but it hardly seems proper to involve our esteemed guest in our troubles...
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Ah, understood. Thank you! But I'm afraid we can't spare any of our own to assist you. Rest assured, the Montellis are always generous. Here's an advance. Once the matter is resolved, you'll be well-rewarded.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Yes, that's right. Please accept it. If that's all, I must be on my way. There are many matters to attend to...
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes
